navigation.archive_path: seed → click 'Archives' link → /archives lists all volumes → click a volume, e.g., /volume-29, which lists individual articles
navigation.notes: The journal is hosted on Squarespace. The main page lists the current issue’s articles with PDF links directly available. Volume URLs follow the pattern /volume-{number} and contain the article listings. No separate article HTML pages exist; PDFs are linked straight from the listing, so author and date metadata are not present in the page content. Pagination is not used on the archive or volume pages.
